scripts.install-all: npm install && cd source_code && npm install && cd frontend && npm install
scripts.test: concurrently "cd source_code && npm test" "cd source_code/frontend && npm test"
scripts.build: concurrently "cd source_code && npm run build" "cd source_code/frontend && npm run build"
scripts.lint: concurrently "cd source_code && npm run lint" "cd source_code/frontend && npm run lint"
scripts.format: concurrently "cd source_code && npm run format" "cd source_code/frontend && npm run format"
